title: The Duke's Magically Impaired Daughter
overview: Barred from his dream job, a young sorcerer leaps at a suspiciously generous offer.

title: That Which Rejects
overview: Ellie's talents bloom, but despite Allen's best efforts, Tina has yet to manage a single spell.

title: In the Wake of Tears, Flowers Bloom
overview: Tina loses control, calling up an ice storm that threatens Allen and herself.

title: The Final Exam
overview: Tina and Ellie train for the duke's challenge, but do they stand a chance against a full-fledged sorcerer?

title: The Royal Academy at Last (1)
overview: Tina and Ellie take their entrance exams while Allen renews old acquaintances.

title: The Royal Academy at Last (2)
overview: Lydia kicks off her court sorceress career by picking a fight with a prince, and Allen rushes to intervene.

title: Extracurricular Lessons at a Hot Spring
Imitation
overview: Prince Gerard storms into the academy. The girls have come a long way, but can they fend off a grown knight?

title: A Lightless Road
overview: The danger has passed, but mysteries remain. And Stella's inner demons have only grown stronger.

title: Felicia's Decision
overview: Felicia gets a shock when her father fails Allen's interview to do business with the ducal houses.

title: On a Night when the Moon and Stars Shine Bright
overview: Allen surprises the runaway Stella with an unexpected plan to cure her woes.

title: The Girls' Battle
overview: With Allen's help, Stella challenges her best friend and her sister to reclaim her self-confidence.
